title: Bitdeer Technologies Group (BTDR) Q2 2025 Earnings Highlights
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (BTDR) Q2 2025 earnings highlights show financial performance. Revenue reached $155.6 million, representing substantial growth of 122% sequentially and 57% year-over-year. However, the company faced profitability challenges with a negative IFRS net income of $147.5 million and adjusted loss of $24.4 million. Revenue breakdown included self-mining at $59.3 million (up 42.5% YoY), Palmer sales at $69.5 million (new revenue stream from equipment sales), and cloud hash rate at $0 (declined from $12.2 million in Q2 2024). The company achieved a substantial increase in self-mining hash rate, increasing by 162% from the beginning of the year to 22.3 exahash by the end of July. Management targets 40 exahash by October 2025. Gross margin compressed to 8.2% from 24.6% year-over-year, primarily due to Bitcoin's April 2024 halving event and increased mining difficulty. Operating expenses rose to $42.3 million from $26.1 million. Cash on hand stood at $299.8 million, supplemented by $169.3 million in cryptocurrencies, though borrowings reached $533.1 million.
